title: v1.1: normalize LoRA subfolders (lowercase-hyphen-dotted) + add wan-2.2-5b/ home; coordinated across G:/R2/deps/workflows
description:
FOLLOW-UP to the R2 flat-layout migration (this RunPod/v1.1 branch). During that migration we made R2 mirror the local ComfyUI models layout under vision/models/<type>/<file>. While there we found the LoRA subfolders on G:/CubricModels are inconsistently named and one model has no home. This card normalizes them. DO IT ON v1.1 as a single coordinated change — it touches 4 surfaces that MUST stay in lockstep or a gen breaks.

CURRENT (inconsistent) G:/CubricModels/loras/ subfolders: 'LTX2.3' (PascalCase, dotless), 'wan 2.2' (lowercase, SPACE, dotted), 'sdxl'. The Wan 2.2 5B turbo LoRA sits LOOSE at loras/ root (no subfolder home).

TARGET convention = lowercase-hyphen-dotted (matches R2 family naming wan-2.2/ltx-2.3/sdxl):
  loras/ltx-2.3/            (was loras/LTX2.3/)
  loras/wan-2.2/           (was 'loras/wan 2.2/' — kills the space)
  loras/wan-2.2-5b/        (NEW — move the loose Wan22_TI2V_5B_Turbo_lora_rank_64_fp16.safetensors here)
  loras/sdxl/              (unchanged)

BLAST RADIUS — edit ALL of these together:
  1. G:/CubricModels/loras/ — rename dirs on disk; create wan-2.2-5b/ and move the 5B turbo lora into it.
  2. R2 (cubric-models, vision/models/loras/) — rclone moveto the objects to the new subfolder paths. Currently on R2: loras/LTX2.3/* (3 files, incl id-lora-talkvid/ nested) and loras/Wan22_TI2V_5B_Turbo_lora_rank_64_fp16.safetensors (root). Move to loras/ltx-2.3/* and loras/wan-2.2-5b/Wan22_TI2V_5B_Turbo_...safetensors. (SDXL loras are user-slot, not deps — leave.)
  3. dependencies.js — update `filename` AND `url` for the 3 LTX loras (ltx23-lora-merged, ltx23-lora-transition, ltx23-lora-talkvid) and the 5B turbo (wan22-5b-turbo-lora). url stays url = base + filename, so both move together. Comment on wan22-5b-turbo-lora already notes the space-normalization intent.
  4. Baked workflow lora_name strings — comfy_workflows/LTX_*.json bake `lora_name: "LTX2.3\\..."` (Windows backslash + old PascalCase subfolder) -> change to the new ltx-2.3/ subfolder. Wan5B_*.json bake the 5B turbo by BARE name (loras/ root) -> if it moves into wan-2.2-5b/, either add the subfolder to lora_name OR confirm ComfyUI resolves by bare name across subfolders (verify on a Pod). Also the template comfy_workflows/scripts/workflow_generation/*.json.

GOTCHAS:
  - ComfyUI LoRA loaders resolve lora_name RELATIVE to the loras/ root, and the LTX workflows DO bake the subfolder (backslash sep). Renaming the subfolder WILL break the LTX workflows unless the lora_name is edited too. This is the whole reason for a coordinated card.
  - The wan22-5b-turbo lora is currently baked by BARE name (works because it's at loras/ root today). Moving it into a subfolder REQUIRES the lora_name to gain the subfolder prefix, or the loader won't find it.
  - mpi-ci: the Pod image does NOT bake these LoRAs (they download at model-install), so no Dockerfile change — but re-verify.
  - Keep url == base + filename invariant after the rename.

VERIFY: after rename, run one LTX gen (t2v) and one Wan5B gen (t2v) on the RESULTING layout — locally AND on a Pod — and confirm the LoRA loads (no 'lora not found'). grep comfy_workflows for any stale 'LTX2.3' or 'wan 2.2' string.

CONTEXT: sibling migration already SHIPPED this session — R2 collapsed from vision/<family>/<type> to vision/models/<type>, 8 HF-only deps (wan_2.1_vae, umt5, 2 upscalers, 3 yolo, sam-vit-b) uploaded to R2, dependencies.js fully off HuggingFace. This card is the ONLY remaining piece and was deferred because the subfolder rename is riskier (workflow lora_name coupling).
completion_note: SHIPPED 2026-07-02. All 4 surfaces done + reconciled: (1) G:/CubricModels/loras renamed LTX2.3->ltx-2.3, 'wan 2.2'->wan-2.2, new wan-2.2-5b/ with the 5B turbo moved in, sdxl/ untouched. (2) R2 restructured vision/<family>/<type> -> flat vision/models/<type> (22 objects server-side moveto) + 8 HF-only deps uploaded from G: (wan_2.1_vae, umt5, 4x-NMKD-Siax, 4x-AnimeSharp, face/hand/person-yolov8n, sam-vit-b) -> dependencies.js now 0 HuggingFace urls; loras re-nested to loras/ltx-2.3/* and loras/wan-2.2-5b/. Final R2 = 30 objects, reconciled 1:1 against the 30 deps urls (comm: zero orphans either direction). (3) dependencies.js: all 30 model urls = https://models.cubric.studio/vision/models/<filename>, url tail == filename invariant holds; 4 lora filenames+urls on new subfolders. (4) Workflows: 43 JSONs parse; all lora_name on new convention (ltx-2.3\..., wan-2.2-5b\Wan22...), backslash-escaping fixed. R2 README (MadPony-Identity) path-convention doc updated to flat-mirror. CAVEAT — NOT gen-verified: the LTX t2v + Wan5B t2v smoke gens in the VERIFY step were NOT run (app was closed to release the Windows folder-lock during the G: rename; no live gen executed). Recommend one LTX + one Wan5B gen on next app launch to confirm the LoRA loads (no 'lora not found') before relying on it. User-side update migration (master->v1.1) evaluated and found UNNEEDED: master v1.0 ships zero lora subfolders (only loras/sdxl/ by model.type, which is unchanged), so a fresh-from-master user has nothing to rename; the LTX/5B names only ever existed on the RunPod dev branch (candidate MPI-179 was written then deleted as not-needed).
